description_long: This object represents a highly abstracted adult pedestrian, depicted as two vertically aligned, irregular polygonal shapes connected at a narrow midpoint, suggesting a simplified human form. The upper and lower segments are roughly hexagonal, with the upper segment slightly smaller, possibly indicating a head and torso, while the lower segment suggests the lower body. The form is slender and symmetrical, with no visible limbs, facial features, or detailed anatomical elements. The surface appears uniformly smooth and matte, with a consistent gray coloration throughout. The object is minimalistic, lacking any visible clothing details, accessories, or distinguishing marks. Its overall proportions and upright alignment evoke the silhouette of a standing adult in an urban environment.
description: A minimalistic, abstract representation of a standing adult pedestrian, composed of two connected polygonal shapes with a smooth gray surface.
description_view_0: From this view, the object appears as two thin, vertical lines, emphasizing its narrow profile and lack of visible depth.
description_view_1: This view reveals the full polygonal shapes, showing the stacked, irregular hexagonal forms connected at the center, giving the impression of a stylized human figure.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, the object is seen edge-on, appearing as two parallel vertical lines with minimal visible detail.
description_view_3: Like view 1, this view displays the broad faces of the polygonal segments, highlighting the abstract, geometric human form.
attribute_clothing_type: featureless abstract form with no visible clothing details
